output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY13-055","author":"ClayVines84","text":"Just managed to beat the high score on the new puzzle app! 🎮 The logic levels are actually tricky this time, finally cracked it after three tries. #Gaming #AchievementUnlocked","category":"Normal","correctAction":"Approve","difficulty":"Easy","explanation":"This is a standard user post sharing a personal gaming achievement and opinion about an app's difficulty; no harmful content or policy violation is present.","day":13,"correctEscalationReason":"","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"correctSpecialistReason":"","acceptableSpecialistReasons":[],"accountAgeDays":1481,"followerCount":16550,"followingCount":337,"verifiedStatus":false,"postCount":2923,"bio":"Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.","previousFlags":0,"location":"Dunmere","platform":"EchoBoard","isStoryPost":false}]}`
